allow: Bash(node.exe -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),path=require\('path'\),base='c:/code/chatui/node_modules';function isCJS\(d\){try{const p=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(path.join\(d,'package.json'\),'utf8'\)\);if\(p.type==='module'\)return false;if\(p.exports\){const s=JSON.stringify\(p.exports\);if\(s.includes\('\\"import\\"'\)||s.includes\('\\"module\\"'\)\)return false;}return true;}catch{return false;}}const seen=new Set\(\),cjs=[];const q=['i18next','i18next-resources-to-backend','react-i18next','react-markdown','remark-gfm','zustand'];while\(q.length\){const n=q.shift\(\);if\(seen.has\(n\)\)continue;seen.add\(n\);const d=path.join\(base,n\);if\(!fs.existsSync\(d\)\)continue;if\(isCJS\(d\)\)cjs.push\(n\);try{const p=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(path.join\(d,'package.json'\),'utf8'\)\);q.push\(...Object.keys\({...p.dependencies||{},...p.peerDependencies||{}}\).filter\(x=>!x.startsWith\('@types'\)\)\);}catch{}}console.log\(cjs.join\('\\n'\)\);")
